# Vendored third-party (single-header only)

| Library | Version | Source | License |
|---|---|---|---|
| doctest | v2.5.2 | github.com/doctest/doctest | MIT |
| nlohmann/json | v3.12.0 | github.com/nlohmann/json | MIT |
| cpp-httplib | v0.49.0 | github.com/yhirose/cpp-httplib | MIT |

Update procedure: re-download the pinned single header at a newer tag, update
this table, note it in .agents/parity-ledger.md. No compiled deps allowed
(.agents/discipline.md).
